data: {"item_id":"","output_index":0,"part":{"text":"**Evaluating extension updates**\n\nThe current extension on saveConfig updates workspace config fields, but I could modify it by building nextConfig from current and incoming data before the update. To use the `apply_patch` command, you should pass a message of the following structure as \"input\":\n\n*** Begin Patch\n[YOUR_PATCH]\n*** End Patch\n\nWhere [YOUR_PATCH] is the actual content of your patch, specified in the following V4A diff format.\n\n*** [ACTION] File: [/absolute/path/to/file] -\u003e ACTION can be one of Add, Update, or Delete.\nAn example of a message that you might pass as \"input\" to this function, in order to apply a patch, is shown below.\n\n*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: /Users/someone/pygorithm/searching/binary_search.py\n@@class BaseClass\n@@    def search():\n-        pass\n+        raise NotImplementedError()\n\n@@class Subclass\n@@    def search():\n-        pass\n+        raise NotImplementedError()\n\n*** End Patch\nDo not use line numbers in this diff format.","name":"apply_patch","parameters":{"properties":{"explanation":{"description":"A short description of what the tool call is aiming to achieve.","type":"string"},"input":{"description":"The edit patch to apply.","type":"string"}},"required":["input","explanation"],"type":"object"},"strict":false,"type":"function"},{"description":"Create a new directory structure in the workspace.
